title: Daoist Canon: Zaoshen Jing (Stove God Scripture) (Section 2)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Zaoshen Jing (Stove God Scripture)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Zaoshen Jing (Stove God Scripture)

translation.text: From the Zaoshen Jing (Stove God Scripture) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
